note: CLOSED status requires live runtime evidence. FIX_REQUIRED blocks merge. CI_NOT_CONFIGURED is not a failure. evidence_quality_note documents gaps without blocking topics closed under prior standard.
overall_merge_safety: SAFE — no violations, no FIX_REQUIRED items

DSH-000.reason: All foundation gates pass. Docker runtime UP. Contracts valid. All guards PASS.

WLT-000.reason: WLT Go backend UP at 58083. Migration applied (wlt-000_financial_references.sql). 4 reference tables created. Seeds inserted. Reference endpoints return 200. slice:gate PASS.
WLT-000.corrected_from: Previously documented as NOT_IMPLEMENTED in dsh_wlt_status.json — STALE. Resolved in forensic audit 2026-06-22.
WLT-000.pending: WLT-001+ mutation APIs (payment, refund, settlement) — NOT_APPROVED_YET
WLT-000.next_topic_allowed: WLT-001 requires separate approval before any mutation implementation

DSH-001.reason: Full-stack store discovery closed across all 5 surfaces. 118/118 tests PASS. All guards PASS. Real API data (6 stores from DB). Control-panel shows success and error state screenshots. Mobile surfaces show success state screenshots.

evidence_quality_note.detail: app-client, app-captain, app-field, app-partner each have 1 success screenshot. Error/loading/empty states are unit-tested in shared controllers (118/118 tests pass) but not screenshot-verified. control-panel has success, error, and detail-panel screenshots (3 screenshots).
evidence_quality_note.what_is_verified: Technical closure is genuine: real API, real DB, all guards pass, all controllers unit-tested including error/empty/loading state transitions.
evidence_quality_note.v2_gap: The REAL_EXPERIENCE_CLOSURE_v2 standard requires error/loading/empty screenshots per surface. Mobile surfaces do not meet v2 visual evidence standard.
evidence_quality_note.action_required: NONE for DSH-001 closure — technical closure is valid. v2 standard mandatory from DSH-002 control-panel onward.
evidence_quality_note.escalation: If user requires v2 retroactive compliance, add error/loading/empty screenshots for mobile surfaces. This is optional until explicitly requested.
